title: HashSet<String> in compile() should borrow as HashSet<&str>
description: In compile() (lib.rs ~line 149), declared_extensions is HashSet<String> populated by cloning &String values out of the already-owned parsed forms. Because parsed outlives declared_extensions in the same function body, this could be HashSet<&str> borrowing directly from the Form::Str(s) payloads — eliminating one String allocation and clone per declared extension. The contains() calls already use as_str() correctly, so the change is local to the declaration and insert sites.
